Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Rigveda |title = [[:en:Rigveda|Rigveda]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
|basestyle = background-color:#FFC569; |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Mandala|Mandalas]] |list1 = * [[:en:Mandala 1|1]] * [[:en:Mandala 2|2]] * [[:en:Mandala 3|3]] * [[:en:Mandala 4|4]] * [[:en:Mandala 5|5]] * [[:en:Mandala 6|6]] * [[:en:Mandala 7|7]] * [[:en:Mandala 8|8]] * [[:en:Mandala 9|9]] * [[:en:Mandala 10|10]]
|group2 = [[:en:Rigvedic deities|Deities]] |list2 = * [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|Devas]] ** [[:en:Agni|Agni]] ** [[:en:Indra|Indra]] ** [[:en:Chandra|Soma]] ** [[:en:Ushas|Ushas]] * [[:en:visvedevas|visvedevas]] * [[:en:Maruts|Maruts]] * [[:en:Ashvins|Ashvins]] *[[:en:Tvashtr|Tvashtr]] *[[:en:Ribhus|Ribhus]] *[[:en:Pushan|Pushan]] *[[:en:Rudra|Rudra]] *[[:en:Mitra (Hindu god)|Mitra]] *[[:en:Varuna|Varuna]] *[[:en:Aryaman|Aryaman]] |group3 = [[:en:Asura|Asura]]s |list3 = *[[:en:Vritra|Vritra]] *[[:en:Susna|Susna]] *[[:en:Dasa|Dasa]]s *[[:en:Danu (Asura)|Danu]] *[[Danava_(Hinduism)|Danavas]] |group4 = [[:en:Rigvedic rivers|Rivers]] |list4 = * [[:en:Sapta Sindhu|Sapta Sindhu]] * [[:en:Nadistuti sukta|Nadistuti]] * [[:en:Sarasvati River|Sarasvati]] * [[:en:Indus River|Sindhu]] * [[:en:Sarayu (Rigvedic river)|Sarayu]] * [[:en:Rasā|Rasā]] * [[:en:Yavyavati|Yavyavati]] * [[:en:Drishadvati river|Drishadvati]]
|group5 = [[:en:Rishi|Rishis]] |list5 = * [[:en:Saptarishi|Saptarishi]] ** [[:en:Gritsamada|Gritsamada]] ** [[:en:Vishvamitra|Vishvamitra]] ** [[:en:Vamadeva|Vamadeva]] ** [[:en:Atri|Atri]] ** [[:en:Angiras|Angiras]] ** [[:en:Bharadwaja|Bharadvaja]] ** [[:en:Vasishtha|Vasishtha]] * [[:en:Dirghatamas|Dirghatamas]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Vedas| ]] }} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Rigveda |title = [[:en:Rigveda|Rigveda]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
|basestyle = background-color:#FFC569; |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Mandala|Mandalas]] |list1 = * [[:en:Mandala 1|1]] * [[:en:Mandala 2|2]] * [[:en:Mandala 3|3]] * [[:en:Mandala 4|4]] * [[:en:Mandala 5|5]] * [[:en:Mandala 6|6]] * [[:en:Mandala 7|7]] * [[:en:Mandala 8|8]] * [[:en:Mandala 9|9]] * [[:en:Mandala 10|10]]
|group2 = [[:en:Rigvedic deities|Deities]] |list2 = * [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|Devas]] ** [[:en:Agni|Agni]] ** [[:en:Indra|Indra]] ** [[:en:Chandra|Soma]] ** [[:en:Ushas|Ushas]] * [[:en:visvedevas|visvedevas]] * [[:en:Maruts|Maruts]] * [[:en:Ashvins|Ashvins]] *[[:en:Tvashtr|Tvashtr]] *[[:en:Ribhus|Ribhus]] *[[:en:Pushan|Pushan]] *[[:en:Rudra|Rudra]] *[[:en:Mitra (Hindu god)|Mitra]] *[[:en:Varuna|Varuna]] *[[:en:Aryaman|Aryaman]] |group3 = [[:en:Asura|Asura]]s |list3 = *[[:en:Vritra|Vritra]] *[[:en:Susna|Susna]] *[[:en:Dasa|Dasa]]s *[[:en:Danu (Asura)|Danu]] *[[Danava_(Hinduism)|Danavas]] |group4 = [[:en:Rigvedic rivers|Rivers]] |list4 = * [[:en:Sapta Sindhu|Sapta Sindhu]] * [[:en:Nadistuti sukta|Nadistuti]] * [[:en:Sarasvati River|Sarasvati]] * [[:en:Indus River|Sindhu]] * [[:en:Sarayu (Rigvedic river)|Sarayu]] * [[:en:Rasā|Rasā]] * [[:en:Yavyavati|Yavyavati]] * [[:en:Drishadvati river|Drishadvati]]
|group5 = [[:en:Rishi|Rishis]] |list5 = * [[:en:Saptarishi|Saptarishi]] ** [[:en:Gritsamada|Gritsamada]] ** [[:en:Vishvamitra|Vishvamitra]] ** [[:en:Vamadeva|Vamadeva]] ** [[:en:Atri|Atri]] ** [[:en:Angiras|Angiras]] ** [[:en:Bharadwaja|Bharadvaja]] ** [[:en:Vasishtha|Vasishtha]] * [[:en:Dirghatamas|Dirghatamas]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Vedas| ]] }} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Rigveda |title = [[:en:Rigveda|Rigveda]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
|basestyle = background-color:#FFC569; |listclass = hlist
|group1 = [[Mandala|Mandalas]] |list1 = * [[:en:Mandala 1|1]] * [[:en:Mandala 2|2]] * [[:en:Mandala 3|3]] * [[:en:Mandala 4|4]] * [[:en:Mandala 5|5]] * [[:en:Mandala 6|6]] * [[:en:Mandala 7|7]] * [[:en:Mandala 8|8]] * [[:en:Mandala 9|9]] * [[:en:Mandala 10|10]]
|group2 = [[:en:Rigvedic deities|Deities]] |list2 = * [[:en:Deva (Hinduism)|Devas]] ** [[:en:Agni|Agni]] ** [[:en:Indra|Indra]] ** [[:en:Chandra|Soma]] ** [[:en:Ushas|Ushas]] * [[:en:visvedevas|visvedevas]] * [[:en:Maruts|Maruts]] * [[:en:Ashvins|Ashvins]] *[[:en:Tvashtr|Tvashtr]] *[[:en:Ribhus|Ribhus]] *[[:en:Pushan|Pushan]] *[[:en:Rudra|Rudra]] *[[:en:Mitra (Hindu god)|Mitra]] *[[:en:Varuna|Varuna]] *[[:en:Aryaman|Aryaman]] |group3 = [[:en:Asura|Asura]]s |list3 = *[[:en:Vritra|Vritra]] *[[:en:Susna|Susna]] *[[:en:Dasa|Dasa]]s *[[:en:Danu (Asura)|Danu]] *[[Danava_(Hinduism)|Danavas]] |group4 = [[:en:Rigvedic rivers|Rivers]] |list4 = * [[:en:Sapta Sindhu|Sapta Sindhu]] * [[:en:Nadistuti sukta|Nadistuti]] * [[:en:Sarasvati River|Sarasvati]] * [[:en:Indus River|Sindhu]] * [[:en:Sarayu (Rigvedic river)|Sarayu]] * [[:en:Rasā|Rasā]] * [[:en:Yavyavati|Yavyavati]] * [[:en:Drishadvati river|Drishadvati]]
|group5 = [[:en:Rishi|Rishis]] |list5 = * [[:en:Saptarishi|Saptarishi]] ** [[:en:Gritsamada|Gritsamada]] ** [[:en:Vishvamitra|Vishvamitra]] ** [[:en:Vamadeva|Vamadeva]] ** [[:en:Atri|Atri]] ** [[:en:Angiras|Angiras]] ** [[:en:Bharadwaja|Bharadvaja]] ** [[:en:Vasishtha|Vasishtha]] * [[:en:Dirghatamas|Dirghatamas]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Vedas| ]] }} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
